records.ety: [L. pleonasmus, Gr. <?/, fr. <?/ to be more than enough, to abound, fr.<?/, neut. of <?/, more, compar. of <?/ much. See Full, a., and cf. Poly-, Plus.]

defs: Redundancy of language in speaking or writing; the use of more words than are necessary to express the idea; as, I saw it with my own eyes.
